words.derivation: a primary preposition denoting (fixed) position (in place, time or state), and (by implication) instrumentality (medially or constructively), i.e. a relation of rest (intermediate between G1519 (εἰς) and G1537 (ἐκ));
words.kjv_def: about, after, against, + almost, X altogether, among, X as, at, before, between, (here-)by (+ all means), for (… sake of), + give self wholly to, (here-)in(-to, -wardly), X mightily, (because) of, (up-)on, (open-)ly, X outwardly, one, X quickly, X shortly, (speedi-)ly, X that, X there(-in, -on), through(-out), (un-)to(-ward), under, when, where(-with), while, with(-in)
beginning, corner, (at the, the) first (estate), magistrate, power, principality, principle, rule
words.strongs_def: (properly abstract) a commencement, or (concretely) chief (in various applications of order, time, place, or rank)

words.derivation: the first person singular present indicative; a prolonged form of a primary and defective verb;
words.kjv_def: am, have been, X it is I, was
the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc
words.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)

words.kjv_def: account, cause, communication, X concerning, doctrine, fame, X have to do, intent, matter, mouth, preaching, question, reason, + reckon, remove, say(-ing), shew, X speaker, speech, talk, thing, + none of these things move me, tidings, treatise, utterance, word, work
words.strongs_def: something said (including the thought); by implication, a topic (subject of discourse), also reasoning (the mental faculty) or motive; by extension, a computation; specially, (with the article in John) the Divine Expression (i.e. Christ)

words.derivation: apparently, a primary particle, having a copulative and sometimes also a cumulative force;
words.kjv_def: and, also, both, but, even, for, if, or, so, that, then, therefore, when, yet
words.strongs_def: and, also, even, so then, too, etc.; often used in connection (or composition) with other particles or small words

words.kjv_def: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc
words.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)

words.kjv_def: account, cause, communication, X concerning, doctrine, fame, X have to do, intent, matter, mouth, preaching, question, reason, + reckon, remove, say(-ing), shew, X speaker, speech, talk, thing, + none of these things move me, tidings, treatise, utterance, word, work
words.strongs_def: something said (including the thought); by implication, a topic (subject of discourse), also reasoning (the mental faculty) or motive; by extension, a computation; specially, (with the article in John) the Divine Expression (i.e. Christ)

words.derivation: the first person singular present indicative; a prolonged form of a primary and defective verb;
words.kjv_def: am, have been, X it is I, was

about, according to , against, among, at, because of, before, between, (where-)by, for, X at thy house, in, for intent, nigh unto, of, which pertain to, that, to (the end that), X together, to (you) -ward, unto, with(-in)
words.strongs_def: a preposition of direction; forward to, i.e. toward (with the genitive case, the side of, i.e. pertaining to; with the dative case, by the side of, i.e. near to; usually with the accusative case, the place, time, occasion, or respect, which is the destination of the relation, i.e. whither or for which it is predicated)

words.kjv_def: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc
words.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)

words.derivation: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;
words.strongs_def: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588) the supreme Divinity; figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very: — X exceeding, God, god(-ly, -ward).
